chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1684 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.8717/2018 (E/A) 3. For hearing of main case 30-03-2022 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present on behalf of the Petitioners nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. On perusal of the prayer clause, it appears that the Petitioners have filed this Petition impugning the judgment of Sindh Service Tribunal at Karachi. The same cannot be challenged before this Court in Constitutional jurisdiction. Accordingly, the Petition is misconceived and is hereby dismissed with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
